messages.content: I need a user login feature with email and password in Python, return a token on success. Use Python only.

requirements.title: User Authentication with Email and Password
requirements.description: Implement a user login system that accepts email and password credentials, validates them, and returns an authentication token upon successful verification.
acceptance_criteria: System accepts email and password as input parameters
System validates email format is correct
System verifies password matches stored credentials for the email
System returns a secure authentication token upon successful login
System returns appropriate error message for invalid credentials
Token generation follows secure cryptographic practices

requirements.title: Secure Token Generation and Management
requirements.description: Generate and manage secure authentication tokens that can be used for subsequent API calls and user session management.
acceptance_criteria: Tokens are generated using secure cryptographic algorithms
Tokens contain sufficient entropy to prevent guessing attacks
Tokens have configurable expiration time
Token payload includes user identification information
System can validate token authenticity and expiration

requirements.title: Credential Validation and Error Handling
requirements.description: Implement comprehensive validation for login credentials and provide clear error responses for various failure scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: System validates email format before checking credentials
System checks if user exists before password verification
System provides different error messages for invalid email vs incorrect password
System implements rate limiting to prevent brute force attacks
Error responses follow consistent API error format

requirements.title: Python Implementation Requirements
requirements.description: All authentication functionality must be implemented using Python programming language with appropriate libraries and frameworks.
acceptance_criteria: Implementation uses Python 3.8 or higher
Code follows PEP 8 style guidelines
Authentication logic is modular and testable
Dependencies are clearly documented
Includes unit tests for authentication functions

current_step_title: Implement email format validation using regex patterns to ensure correct email structure
last_action_summary: Implement step R001-S02 in auth/validators.py for interface validate_email_format.
